## Test plan

- [ ] Ran `PYTHONPATH=. python -m pytest` locally
- [ ] Ran `docker compose run --rm utm python -m pytest` before marking ready for review (if applicable)
- [ ] Ran E2E tests (`tests/e2e` or `./scripts/run-e2e-docker.sh`) for UI/JS changes (if applicable)
- [ ] Checked the app manually for UI/route/export changes (if applicable)
- [ ] I certify my contribution under the [DCO](DCO) (`Signed-off-by` on all commits)
- [ ] I applied adversarial review (security, edge cases, test coverage) for changes touching routes, templates, JS, or persistence
